jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NABARD
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!
